summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and PR creation are disabled for this job; all five open PRs should remain open for their existing maintainer/proof/review lanes.

actions.reason: Useful focused bug-fix PR with unresolved proof/check state; not safe or allowed to close, merge, or repair in this inventory shard.
Useful provider fix tied to an open issue, but final technical/compatibility review is explicitly a maintainer lane.
Maintainer-owned stacked PR with failing guard/check signals; job frontmatter requires human handling for maintainer signal and green-check decisions.
Useful active replacement PR for a valid open issue, but broad migration/auth-provider/session-state work remains maintainer-review territory in this inventory shard.
Narrow focused bug-fix PR with fresh proof/check evidence, but it still needs normal maintainer review outside this inventory-only job.

needs_human: #93174 is maintainer-owned, assigned, stacked on #93114, and has failing guard/check signals; human maintainer handling is required for the next step.
